meta.title: VIING — goods from China for business | wholesale & Private Label
meta.description: VIING — import and wholesale supply of goods from China: hygiene, packaging, home goods and HoReCa, plus private-label manufacturing. A reliable partner for businesses in Uzbekistan and the CIS.
meta.shortDescription: Import and wholesale supply of goods from China. Catalog, Private Label and made-to-order manufacturing.
meta.ogTitle: VIING — goods from China for your business
meta.keywords: wholesale from China, bulk supply, hygiene wholesale, packaging materials, HoReCa, private label, contract manufacturing, Uzbekistan, VIING

hero.title: Goods from China for your business
hero.subtitle: A wide range of quality products, private brands and made-to-order manufacturing. A reliable partner for wholesale buyers across Central Asia.

brand.title: Manufacturing under your brand
brand.subtitle: We create products under your trademark with full quality control at every stage.
brand.metaDescription: Manufacturing of goods under your own trademark: packaging and design development, material selection, production at verified factories in China, quality control and delivery.
brand.pageSubtitle: From idea to a finished batch under your own trademark. We handle design, production, quality control and delivery — you get a ready product under your logo.

steps.title: Brief and product selection
steps.description: We discuss the goal, volume and budget and pick the right product and materials for your market.

steps.title: Design and packaging
steps.description: We develop the packaging artwork, apply your logo and approve samples before launch.

steps.title: Factory production
steps.description: We place the order at a verified factory and monitor the production timeline.

steps.title: Quality control and certification
steps.description: We inspect the batch and prepare the required documents and certificates.

steps.title: Logistics and delivery
steps.description: We arrange shipping and customs clearance to your warehouse end-to-end.

brand.ctaSubtitle: Tell us about the product — we'll prepare a quote and suggest the best solution.

whyUs.title: Why businesses choose VIING
whyUs.subtitle: We take on the full cycle — from sourcing the product to delivery at your warehouse.

items.title: Verified suppliers
items.description: We work only with reliable manufacturers in China

items.title: Quality control
items.description: Product inspection at every production stage

items.title: Favorable terms
items.description: Direct contracts and the best wholesale prices

items.title: Full support
items.description: We handle the whole process — from order to delivery

about.metaDescription: VIING is an international company: quality goods from China and manufacturing under your own brand. A full cycle — from sourcing suppliers to delivery anywhere in the world.
about.title: We connect business with opportunities
about.p1: VIING is an international company that helps businesses source quality goods from China and create products under their own brand.
about.p2: We handle the entire process: from finding verified suppliers and quality control to manufacturing, branding and delivery anywhere in the world.

stats.label: products in the catalog for any request

process.title: Analysis & sourcing
process.description: We study your goal and pick the best product and factory options.

process.title: Supplier vetting
process.description: We audit factories, verify documents and production capacity.

process.title: Samples & approval
process.description: We get samples, test quality and agree on every detail and the packaging.

process.title: Production & control
process.description: We arrange manufacturing and run multi-stage quality control.

process.title: Branding & packaging
process.description: We apply your brand and prepare packaging and accompanying materials.

process.title: Delivery
process.description: We arrange delivery anywhere in the world within optimal timelines.

about.ctaSubtitle: Leave a request — we'll curate the range and send an offer for your volume.

cta.title: Need products from China?
cta.subtitle: Leave a request and get a commercial offer within 24 hours.

catalog.metaDescription: Wholesale catalog of goods from China: hygiene, packaging materials, home goods and HoReCa. Wholesale prices on request, delivery across Uzbekistan and the CIS.
catalog.title: Product catalog
catalog.subtitle: Wholesale supply of goods from China by category. Pick a direction — a manager will curate the range and send a price list for your volume.
catalog.noResultsHint: Try a different query or pick another category
catalog.priceNote: Wholesale prices are calculated for your order volume. Leave a request — we'll send an up-to-date price list and supply terms.
catalog.emptyCategory: Products in this category are coming soon. Write to us — we'll source to your request.
catalog.requestProductMessage: Hello! I'd like the wholesale price and supply terms for: {name}.

hygiene.name: Hygiene
hygiene.desc: Wet wipes, paper products, soap and sanitizers for home and business.

packaging.name: Packaging materials
packaging.desc: Food film, stretch film, tape and consumables for packaging.

home.name: Home goods
home.desc: Household goods, cleaning supplies and everyday essentials.

horeca.name: Business & HoReCa
horeca.desc: Disposable tableware, packaging and consumables for cafés, restaurants and delivery.

private-label.name: Private Label
private-label.desc: Manufacturing of goods under your trademark.

wet-wipes.name: Wet wipes with a lid
wet-wipes.desc: Wet wipes for hands and surfaces with a reusable flip lid. Soft non-woven material that leaves no streaks.

paper-towels.name: Paper towels
paper-towels.desc: Two-ply paper towels in rolls for home, office and venues. High absorbency and a dense roll.

liquid-soap.name: Liquid soap, canister
liquid-soap.desc: Liquid hand soap in an economical canister. Neutral pH, suitable for refilling dispensers.

hand-sanitizer.name: Hand sanitizer
hand-sanitizer.desc: Alcohol-based hand sanitizer gel. Dries quickly; emollients prevent dry skin.

pvc-food-film.name: PVC food film
pvc-food-film.desc: Transparent PVC food film for wrapping products. Clings tightly to surfaces, suitable for manual and automatic packing.

stretch-film-hand.name: Hand stretch film
stretch-film-hand.desc: Hand stretch film for pallet and cargo wrapping. High stretch and tear resistance.

stretch-film-machine.name: Machine stretch film
stretch-film-machine.desc: Machine stretch film for automatic pallet wrapping. Stable tension and economical usage.

packing-tape.name: Packing tape
packing-tape.desc: BOPP adhesive packing tape. Secure box sealing, available clear and brown.

trash-bags.name: Trash bags 120 L
trash-bags.desc: Heavy-duty high-density trash bags. Won't tear under load, convenient for home and business.

cleaning-set.name: Youreko cleaning set
cleaning-set.desc: A cleaning kit: a mop with a wringer, a bucket and replaceable microfiber pads. Ergonomic handle.

dish-sponges.name: Dish sponges
dish-sponges.desc: Foam sponges with an abrasive layer for washing dishes. Won't scratch surfaces and last long.

household-gloves.name: Household gloves
household-gloves.desc: Latex household gloves with an inner coating. Protect hands during cleaning and contact with water.

paper-cups.name: Single-wall paper cups
paper-cups.desc: Disposable paper cups for hot and cold drinks. Food-grade laminated board, ready for logo printing.

food-containers.name: Food containers
food-containers.desc: Disposable containers for delivery and packing ready meals. Airtight lid, withstand hot food.

wooden-cutlery.name: Wooden cutlery
wooden-cutlery.desc: Eco-friendly disposable birch cutlery: forks, spoons, knives. Smooth, splinter-free finish.

dispenser-napkins.name: Dispenser napkins
dispenser-napkins.desc: Paper napkins for tabletop dispensers. Suitable for cafés, restaurants and food courts.

contact.address: Tashkent, Mirzo-Ulugbek district, Shahriobod mahalla, Oliy Khimmat street, 128-A

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.intro: This Policy describes how VIING MCHJ XK (the «Company») processes personal data of users of {url}.
privacy.section1Body: When you submit the contact form we collect: name, phone, email (if provided) and message text. This data is used solely to respond to your request.
section2List: handling inquiries and preparing commercial proposals;
informing you about the status of your requests and shipments.
privacy.section3Body: We do not share your data with third parties, except as required by the law of the Republic of Uzbekistan and our technical contractors (hosting, messengers) acting on our behalf.
privacy.section4Body: Personal data is stored no longer than required for the processing purposes, or until you withdraw your consent.
privacy.section5Body: For personal data questions write to

terms.title: Terms of use
terms.intro: By using the {url} website you agree to these terms. If you do not agree — please stop using the website.
terms.section1Body: The website is informational and does not constitute a public offer. Exact terms, prices and timelines are agreed individually based on your request.
terms.section2Body: All website materials — texts, images, logos — belong to VIING MCHJ XK or are used with the permission of rights holders. Any use without consent is prohibited.
terms.section3Body: The Company makes reasonable efforts to keep information up to date but does not guarantee its completeness and accuracy in all cases.
terms.section4Body: For questions about the terms of use write to
